text: Some prose that itself looks innocuous but the URL must trigger the blocklist.
Anything from this URL must be dropped.
HLE repo content.
Last-exam.ai mirror.
On SWE-bench Verified the model achieved 87.6 percent. The exact instance was...
SWE-bench Pro is harder because the diffs span multiple files.
SWE-bench Multilingual covers nine programming languages.
SWE-bench Multimodal includes design mockups and screenshots.
Terminal-Bench 2.0 tests command-line task completion in container environments.
Recent results on GPQA Diamond: the model scored above 94 percent...
The USAMO 2026 problems were graded by a panel of three frontier-model judges.
GraphWalks BFS at 256K-1M tokens evaluates multi-hop long-context reasoning.
OpenAI MRCR v2 8-needle benchmark at 1M tokens.
Humanity's Last Exam covers 17 fields and is currently used as the canonical agentic-search benchmark.
BrowseComp evaluates an agent's ability to find hard-to-locate information on the open web.
DeepSearchQA is a 900-prompt benchmark for evaluating multi-step information-seeking.
DRACO benchmark: Deep Research Accuracy, Completeness, and Objectivity.
LAB-Bench FigQA tests interpretation of complex scientific figures from biology research papers.
CharXiv Reasoning is built from 2,323 real-world charts sourced from arXiv papers.
ScreenSpot-Pro is a GUI grounding benchmark across 23 professional applications.
OSWorld evaluates agents on a live Ubuntu virtual machine via mouse and keyboard.
OfficeQA Pro is an enterprise benchmark for end-to-end grounded reasoning over Office documents.
Finance Agent benchmark from Vals AI assesses research over public-company SEC filings.
MCP-Atlas measures multi-step Model Context Protocol tool-use workflows.
Vending-Bench 2 simulates running a vending machine business over a year-long horizon.
GDPval-AA tests AI on economically valuable real-world professional tasks.
ARC-AGI-1 measures fluid intelligence on novel input-output pairs.
ARC-AGI-2 measures fluid intelligence given only a handful of input-output pairs.
MMMLU tests knowledge and reasoning across 57 academic subjects in 14 non-English languages.
Cohere Labs Global MMLU (GMMLU) extends MMLU across 42 languages.
AI4Bharat MILU is the Multi-task Indic Language Understanding benchmark across 10 Indic languages.
INCLUDE benchmark covers 44 languages with regional academic and professional examination questions.
Google ECLeKTic tests cross-lingual knowledge transfer across twelve languages.
BioPipelineBench Verified assesses execution of bioinformatics workflows.
BioMysteryBench Verified is a hard analytical biology challenge with unprocessed datasets.
Cybench is a public cyber capabilities benchmark from CTF challenges.
CyberGym tests targeted vulnerability reproduction in real open-source projects.
SHADE-Arena pairs a long-horizon agentic main task with a harmful side task.
Petri 2.0 is the open-source automated behavioral audit tool.
MASK benchmark tests whether a model contradicts its own stated belief under pressure.
AA-Omniscience is a 42-topic closed-book factuality benchmark.
Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) tests model bias in ambiguous and disambiguated questions.
